title: cordia incognita
intro: Cordia incognita, also known as the unknown cordia or unknown tree, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is a shrub or small tree that is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Cordia incognita include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Cordia incognita can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
